attributes.description: Alerts when any cache write errors occur (`storage_cache_writes_err` increases). Indicates memory/cache subsystem issues.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] Cache write errors

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB cache write errors

### What fired
`storage_cache_writes_err` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Cache write errors mean InfluxDB failed to buffer incoming writes in memory. They precede shard write errors and user-visible failures.

### Triage
1. Check host memory utilisation.
2. Inspect InfluxDB logs for specific error messages.

### Remediation
- Scale memory.
- Reduce write volume or shard more aggressively.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.
